hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】万斯表示，美国和伊朗“非常接近”达成协议，但“尚未达成”；【WORLD】以色列对黎巴嫩首都进行“定点打击”；【CRYPTO】联合信贷银行警告欧洲可能难以根据 MiCA 规则遏制加密货币银行危机。

items.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
items.summary: US officials earlier told the BBC that, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership, the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed.
items.title_zh: 万斯表示，美国和伊朗“非常接近”达成协议，但“尚未达成”
items.summary_zh: 美国官员早些时候告诉英国广播公司，在特朗普和伊朗领导人批准之前，停火延期协议的框架已经达成一致。

items.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 以色列对黎巴嫩首都进行“定点打击”
items.summary_zh: 尽管以色列和真主党都互相指责对方违反了上个月的停火协议，但贝鲁特迄今为止基本上没有受到影响。

items.title: UniCredit warns Europe may struggle to contain crypto-bank crisis under MiCA rules
items.summary: EU deposit insurance (up to €100,000) may not absorb stress from large stablecoin reserve accounts, unlike the full protection offered by U.S. regulators.
items.title_zh: 联合信贷银行警告欧洲可能难以根据 MiCA 规则遏制加密货币银行危机
items.summary_zh: 与美国监管机构提供的全面保护不同，欧盟存款保险（最高 10 万欧元）可能无法吸收大型稳定币储备账户的压力。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Officials Say They Are Closing In on Arrangement to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: President Trump has not signed off on the emerging framework, according to U.S. officials. But it could set the table for extending the cease-fire and more substantive negotiations.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国官员表示，他们正在接近安排重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 据美国官员称，特朗普总统尚未签署这一新兴框架。但它可以为延长停火和进行更实质性的谈判奠定基础。

items.title: Calamos bets protected Bitcoin ETFs can outlast crypto market swings
items.summary: As more than $1 billion exited spot Bitcoin ETFs last week, Calamos says investors are rotating into Bitcoin products with built-in downside protection.
items.title_zh: Calamos 押注受保护的比特币 ETF 能够经受住加密货币市场波动的考验
items.summary_zh: 卡拉莫斯表示，随着上周超过 10 亿美元退出现货比特币 ETF，投资者正在转向具有内置下行保护功能的比特币产品。

items.title: Why the Ethereum Foundation is suddenly again at the center of crypto’s culture war
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're diving deep into the institution that has been the main steward for the Ethereum blockchain, and why its been back in the spotlight.
items.title_zh: 为什么以太坊基金会突然再次成为加密货币文化战争的中心
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《协议通讯》中，我们将深入探讨这个一直是以太坊区块链主要管理者的机构，以及它为何重新成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title: Bitwise bets Hyperliquid could power future finance as HYPE ETFs gain traction
items.summary: Bitwise says investor demand for Hyperliquid exposure is surging as new HYPE ETFs launch.
items.title_zh: 随着 HYPE ETF 受到关注，Bitwise 押注 Hyperliquid 将为未来金融提供动力
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 表示，随着新的 HYPE ETF 的推出，投资者对 Hyperliquid 敞口的需求正在激增。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin whale and dolphin accumulation stalled as demand remains weak
items.summary: Bitcoin holding structure continues to deteriorate as whale and dolphin BTC balances have stalled, CryptoQuant said.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant表示，由于需求依然疲弱，比特币鲸鱼和海豚的积累陷入停滞
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，随着鲸鱼和海豚的 BTC 余额停滞不前，比特币持有结构继续恶化。

items.title: Grayscale’s Hyperliquid ETF negotiating ‘seed’ investment of roughly $115 million in HYPE tokens
items.summary: Earlier this month, 21Shares and Bitwise Investments became the first firms to launch HYPE-based exchange-traded funds.
items.title_zh: Grayscale 的 Hyperliquid ETF 正在洽谈约 1.15 亿美元的 HYPE 代币“种子”投资
items.summary_zh: 本月早些时候，21Shares 和 Bitwise Investments 成为首批推出基于 HYPE 的交易所交易基金的公司。

items.title: VanEck’s tokenized VBILL US Treasury fund can now be used as collateral on Euler
items.summary: Securitize launched VanEck's VBILL as a collateral asset in an Euler lending market curated by KPK on Thursday.
items.title_zh: VanEck 的代币化 VBILL 美国国债基金现可用作 Euler 的抵押品
items.summary_zh: Securitize 周四在 KPK 策划的 Euler 贷款市场上推出了 VanEck 的 VBILL 作为抵押资产。

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
items.title_zh: Warp 押注于使用 GPT-5.5 构建开源
items.summary_zh: Warp 使用 GPT-5.5 和 OpenAI 模型来协调本地、云和开源开发工作流程中的编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
items.title_zh: OpenAI、Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 宣布战略内容合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 合作，将值得信赖的巴西新闻引入 ChatGPT，通过归属和透明度扩大新闻访问范围。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
items.summary: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示摩根大通可能斥资 200 亿美元进行收购：“我们正在密切关注”
items.summary_zh: 这笔 200 亿美元的交易将是摩根大通历史上规模最大的交易之一，鉴于其作为美国资产最大银行的地位，可能会引发监管审查。

items.title: Your AI agent can now trade for you on Robinhood. And buy stuff with your credit card too
items.summary: The new products allow customers to create AI assistants capable of carrying out investing strategies or spending instructions with minimal human involvement.
items.title_zh: 您的人工智能代理现在可以在 Robinhood 上为您进行交易。也可以用信用卡买东西
items.summary_zh: 新产品允许客户创建人工智能助手，能够在最少的人工参与下执行投资策略或支出指令。

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗是接近和平还是滑向战争？
items.summary_zh: 尽管最近发生了相互攻击，但双方似乎都没有兴趣恢复全面冲突。

items.title: Learning from Ukraine war, Hezbollah is now using fibre-optic drones to hit Israel
items.summary: Fibre-optic drones are now Hezbollah's primary weapon against Israel's soldiers and civilians.
items.title_zh: 吸取乌克兰战争教训，真主党现在使用光纤无人机袭击以色列
items.summary_zh: 光纤无人机现在是真主党针对以色列士兵和平民的主要武器。

items.title: How Ukraine’s Street Style Is Shaped by the War
items.summary: In Kyiv, military-inspired fashion can be seen everywhere. Soldiers and civilians alike say it’s a show of solidarity, not a fad.
items.title_zh: 战争如何塑造乌克兰的街头风格
items.summary_zh: 在基辅，军事风格的时尚随处可见。士兵和平民都表示，这是一种团结的表现，而不是一种时尚。

items.title: The Mideast Is Baffled by Trump’s Call to Expand Abraham Accords
items.summary: The president said more countries should be required to recognize Israel as part of a deal to end the war with Iran. Analysts say the chances of that happening are close to zero.
items.title_zh: 特朗普呼吁扩大《亚伯拉罕协议》，中东地区感到困惑
items.summary_zh: 总统表示，作为结束与伊朗战争协议的一部分，应该要求更多国家承认以色列。分析人士表示，这种情况发生的可能性接近于零。

items.title: Why Pakistan and Afghanistan Are Still Fighting
items.summary: Months after Pakistan declared “open war” on Afghanistan, neither side appears ready to back down, despite China’s efforts to mediate.
items.title_zh: 为什么巴基斯坦和阿富汗仍在战斗
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦对阿富汗宣战几个月后，尽管中国努力斡旋，但双方似乎都没有准备让步。

items.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
items.summary: FalconX has hired Cantor and other bankers to advise on a potential IPO and confidentially filed draft paperwork with the SEC, though the listing is not expected until later this year amid volatile market conditions.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易公司 FalconX 向 SEC 秘密提交 IPO 申请，并聘请银行家
items.summary_zh: FalconX 已聘请 Cantor 和其他银行家就潜在的 IPO 提供建议，并秘密向 SEC 提交文件草案，不过由于市场状况不稳定，预计要到今年晚些时候才会上市。

items.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
items.title_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程
items.summary_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 正在通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程，帮助思科扩展 AI 原生开发、加速 AI 防御工作并自动执行缺陷修复。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nio shares jump 10% after releasing first flagship EV in more than two years
items.summary: Chinese electric car company Nio has launched two lower-priced brands in the last two years to broaden its customer base in a sluggish Chinese consumer market.
items.title_zh: 两年多来发布首款旗舰电动汽车后，蔚来股价上涨 10%
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司蔚来在过去两年推出了两个低价品牌，以在低迷的中国消费市场中扩大客户群。

items.title: Bitcoin pinned below $73,000 despite potential U.S.-Iran deal news
items.summary: U.S. stocks and bonds, and the oil market are reacting positively to yet another purported peace agreement, but crypto markets remain under heavy pressure.
items.title_zh: 尽管有潜在的美国与伊朗达成协议的消息，比特币仍跌破 73,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 美国股票和债券以及石油市场对另一项所谓的和平协议做出了积极反应，但加密货币市场仍面临巨大压力。

items.title: Gemini crypto exchange launches AI data feed powered by Grok
items.summary: The move comes as Gemini continues to expand beyond spot crypto trading into derivatives, predictions, and other financial services.
items.title_zh: Gemini 加密货币交易所推出由 Grok 提供支持的 AI 数据源
items.summary_zh: 此举正值 Gemini 继续从现货加密货币交易扩展到衍生品、预测和其他金融服务之际。

items.title: Hyperliquid-based prop trading platform Hypernova raises $3 million in pre-seed funding
items.summary: Hyperliquid-based prop trading platform Hypernova says it offers "instant payouts" and plans to publicly launch within the next two months.
items.title_zh: 基于 Hyperliquid 的道具交易平台 Hypernova 筹集了 300 万美元的种子前资金
items.summary_zh: 基于超流动性的自营交易平台 Hypernova 表示，它提供“即时支付”，并计划在未来两个月内公开推出。

items.title: Sequans completes bitcoin treasury unwind, refocuses on IoT semiconductors
items.summary: Sequans said its remaining 658 BTC are now fully unrestricted after completing all convertible debt redemptions.
items.title_zh: Sequans 完成比特币金库剥离，重新专注于物联网半导体
items.summary_zh: Sequans 表示，在完成所有可转换债务赎回后，其剩余的 658 BTC 现在完全不受限制。

items.title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
items.title_zh: ITBench-AA：在代理企业 IT 任务的第一个基准测试中，前沿模型的得分低于 50% — 由人工分析和 IBM 提供

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
items.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 起诉罗德岛州针对预测市场的行为
items.summary_zh: 这是该委员会在谁有权监管赛事合约平台的争议中起诉的第七个州。

items.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
items.title_zh: 博彩协会称各州因预测市场损失了 10 亿美元的税收
items.summary_zh: 美国博彩协会主席兼首席执行官比尔·米勒补充说，他认为预测市场平台相当于“后门体育博彩”。

items.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
items.summary: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.

items.summary_zh: 纽约南区的投诉是在 Polymarket 发生另一起内幕交易案件一个多月后发出的。

items.title: Traders are skeptical of Iran timeline for Strait of Hormuz reopening
items.summary: Despite reports Iran could return the passageway to normal traffic flows within a month of a peace deal, Kalshi traders thought that was unlikely.
items.title_zh: 交易商对伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的时间表持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 尽管有报道称伊朗可能会在和平协议签署后一个月内使该通道恢复正常交通，但卡尔什贸易商认为这不太可能。

items.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
items.summary: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 英伟达宣布 1500 亿美元支出计划后，台湾芯片股上涨
items.summary_zh: 寒武纪等中国大陆芯片巨头的股价周三暴跌。

items.title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
items.summary: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临阻力，中国 4 月份工业利润增长 24.7%，创两年多来最快增幅
items.summary_zh: 受出口强劲、生产者价格上涨和上游产业增长的推动，4月份中国工业利润增速创两年多来最快。

items.title: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
items.summary: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.
items.title_zh: 尽管欧盟推动降低风险，欧洲企业仍加倍投资中国制造业
items.summary_zh: 尽管欧盟面临减少海外依赖的压力，但中国较低的制造成本使许多欧洲企业的供应链留在了中国。

items.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

items.summary_zh: 据报道，至少五名儿童在这次袭击中丧生，袭击目标似乎是一名哈马斯指挥官。

items.title: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna

items.summary_zh: 一名 21 岁的奥地利男子被判犯有策划袭击和其他与恐怖主义有关的罪行。

items.title: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.summary: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.

items.title: Portugal breaks hottest May day record as Europe swelters in heatwave

items.title: In Argentina, U.S. Tech Billionaire Peter Thiel Finds An Escape
items.summary: The billionaire’s new roots in Argentina are said to be partly motivated by concerns about the future of the United States and shared beliefs with Argentina’s right-wing leader.
items.title_zh: 美国科技亿万富翁彼得泰尔在阿根廷找到了出路

items.summary: The deal is part of a broader effort by the Trump administration to press Latin American countries to agree to joint operations inside their borders.

items.title: Pressure Grows on Spain’s Leader After Police Search His Party Office
items.summary: After a judge accused his party of corruption, Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez of Spain has faced mounting calls to resign.

items.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals

items.title: Hyperliquid's pre-IPO SpaceX contracts suffers 45% flash crash, liquidating $1.5 million
items.summary: A massive selloff in a SpaceX crypto token wiped out hundreds of retail traders in 30 minutes because the market lacked enough cash to absorb the shock.

items.summary_zh: 由于市场缺乏足够的现金来吸收冲击，SpaceX 加密代币的大规模抛售在 30 分钟内消灭了数百名散户交易员。

items.title: Toddlers learn by falling: Why DeFi's $20 billion TVL drop is just a market stress-test

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
